Package neqsim.process.equipment.distillation

Class DistillationColumn.EconomicTrayOptimizationResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult
neqsim.process.equipment.distillation.DistillationColumn.EconomicTrayOptimizationResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
DistillationColumn
public static class DistillationColumn.EconomicTrayOptimizationResult extends DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult
Result from an economic tray-count, feed-tray, and optional reflux/boilup search.

The result extends the rigorous tray optimization result with mechanical design, installed capital cost, annual utility cost, and annualized total-cost metrics. Costs are screening-level estimates using the column mechanical design and column cost-estimation correlations.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • EconomicTrayOptimizationResult

      public EconomicTrayOptimizationResult(DistillationColumn.TrayOptimizationResult baseResult, double capitalCost, double annualUtilityCost, double annualizedCapitalCost, double totalAnnualizedCost, double capitalChargeFactor, double operatingHoursPerYear, double steamCostPerTonne, double coolingWaterCostPerM3, double trayEfficiency, int actualTrays, double columnDiameter, double columnHeight, double condenserRefluxRatio, double reboilerRatio)
      Create an economic tray optimization result from a rigorous tray result.
      Parameters:
      baseResult - rigorous tray optimization result used as the process-design basis
      capitalCost - installed capital cost estimate in USD
      annualUtilityCost - annual utility cost estimate in USD/year
      annualizedCapitalCost - annualized capital cost in USD/year
      totalAnnualizedCost - total annualized cost in USD/year
      capitalChargeFactor - capital annualization factor in 1/year
      operatingHoursPerYear - operating hours used for utility costing in hr/year
      steamCostPerTonne - steam cost used for reboiler duty in USD/tonne
      coolingWaterCostPerM3 - cooling-water cost used for condenser duty in USD/m3
      trayEfficiency - overall tray efficiency used to convert theoretical to actual trays
      actualTrays - actual tray count after tray-efficiency correction
      columnDiameter - mechanically designed column diameter in m
      columnHeight - mechanically designed tangent-to-tangent column height in m
      condenserRefluxRatio - selected condenser reflux ratio, or Double.NaN
      reboilerRatio - selected reboiler boilup/reflux ratio, or Double.NaN

    • getCapitalCost

      public double getCapitalCost()
      Get the installed capital cost estimate.
      Returns:

      overall tray efficiency

      Get the selected reboiler boilup/reflux ratio.
